data.title: Plutonian Acquisition Corp II Announces Closing of $100 Million Initial Public Offering
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Plutonian Acquisition Corp II, registered in the Cayman Islands, successfully completed its initial public offering of 10,000,000 units at $10.00 each, totaling an aggregate gross amount of $100,000,000. The company, known as a blank check entity, has concluded this offering, showcasing strong investor interest in its offerings.

data.title: L3Harris Announces Confidential Submission of Draft Registration Statement for Proposed Initial Public Offering of Missile Solutions Business
data.description: A technology company based in Melbourne, Florida, L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) has made a confidential submission of a draft registration statement on Form S-1 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) regarding the potential initial public offering of common stock for its Missile Solutions division. The exact amount of shares to be included in the offering and the price range are yet to be specified. The launch of the initial public offering is contingent on various factors, including market conditions.
China's Industry PMI declined by 1.4 pps to 49.2% in April. The New Order Index dropped by 2 pps to 49.2%. The Production Subindex down by 4.6 pps to 48.7%.

data.title: ASMAX Mode Makes Global Debut, Redefining the Future of Group Ride Communication
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Shenzhen, China, ASMAX unveiled ASMAX Mode, a new intercom mode utilizing Smart Mesh Control (SMC) technology. This cutting-edge mode enhances rider connectivity by merging the reliability of mesh communication technology.

data.title: KIBO Announces Latest Product Releases, Advancing Agentic Commerce and Enterprise Order Management
data.description: KIBO has unveiled its newest product update featuring advanced order routing intelligence, improvements in fulfillment lifecycle, and expanded capabilities in reverse logistics. These enhancements are part of the platform's strategy for growth in 2025, integrating artificial intelligence seamlessly into commerce execution. The announcement was made in Austin, Texas, on April 29, 2026.

data.title: ConnexFM 2026 National Conference Sets Post-Pandemic Attendance Record, Showcases Industry Momentum
data.description: The 2026 National Conference organized by ConnexFM set a new attendance record post-pandemic by drawing in thousands of multisite Facilities Management (FM) professionals. The event, held in IRVING, Texas on April 29, 2026, focused on exploring topics such as Artificial Intelligence (AI), sustainability, and various innovative trends shaping the future of FM.

data.title: Benchmark Senior Living Leaders Honored for Innovative Alzheimer's & Dementia Care
data.description: Michael Tubbs and Michelle Tristani have been honored with the 2026 Memory Care Innovation Awards. The prestigious awards were presented in Waltham, Mass on April 29, 2026, by Benchmark Senior Living, a prominent senior living provider in the Northeast region. Michael Tubbs, serving as the senior director of lifestyle engagement, was recognized alongside his colleague Michelle Tristani. The awards highlight their outstanding contributions and dedication to memory care innovation.

data.title: TaxPlanIQ Announces Its Full 2026 Advisory Summit Plans
data.description: A recent online summit in SOUTHLAKE, Texas on April 29, 2026, provided six complimentary CPE credits and presented a special preview of Tax Projections Software. TaxPlanIQ, a platform designed for accounting firms emphasizing advisory services, organized the event. The summit, titled the 2026 Tax Advisory Summit, focused on enhancing tax planning strategies for professionals. Attendees were able to earn six free CPE credits and gain insight into the upcoming Tax Projections Software.
